notes: PRODUCTION SNAPSHOT 2026-04-07. Source of values: Railway env vars (scanned 2026-04-07) + core/providers/deepinfra_provider.py function-arg defaults at time of capture. Railway sets: DEEPINFRA_MODEL=Qwen/Qwen3-14B, DEEPINFRA_TIMEOUT=30, DEEPINFRA_INCLUDE_REASONING=false, DEEPINFRA_NO_FALLBACK=false. Railway does NOT set any sampling params (temperature/top_p/max_tokens/penalties) — those come from call_deepinfra() arg defaults: temperature=0.7, max_tokens=400, frequency_penalty=0.0 (via DEEPINFRA_FREQUENCY_PENALTY env var, also unset, default 0.0). top_p=1.0 is not passed to the API today (inherits OpenAI SDK default). Note: call sites ALWAYS override max_tokens from per-creator calibration or hardcoded caller values (e.g. dm_agent_v2.py passes 150; SBS retry passes soft_max+20), so the 400 default is rarely hit in prod. CB threshold=3/cooldown=120s stay per-provider env vars (DEEPINFRA_CB_THRESHOLD/COOLDOWN) per DECISIONS.md #6, NOT in this config. thinking.no_think_suffix=/no_think replaces hardcoded substring detection in deepinfra_provider.py:116. Used for: (a) one-release backward compat after refactor, (b) reproducing prod baseline, (c) CCEE benchmark continuity.
